---
title: "Mary Jane Brabazon, Countess of Meath"
---

## Mary Jane Brabazon, Countess of Meath

**Dates:** (1847-1918)

**Maiden name:** (Maitland)

### Description

philanthropist

### Biography

Lady Mary Jane Maitland, daughter of the 11th Earl of Lauderdale, married (1898) Reginald Brabazon (1841-1929), styled Lord Brabazon until 1887 when he succeeded his father as 12th Earl of Meath. His son did not marry until 1908, so all CMY\'s references to Lady Meath must mean her. [PB 1953]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 12th 1890
- Letter from May 28th [1887]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
